notes: 3.37 (server/UI only, no node update): the node card's ACTIVE/IDLE badge now reflects whether the node actually has jobs running. A node runs several worker threads sharing one ID, but the server tracks only one 'current job' per node — so when that one finished the card wrongly showed IDLE while other threads were still encoding. The badge now shows ACTIVE if the node is online and has any processing jobs. Node 2.31 unchanged. Reminder from earlier releases: keep every node on the SAME known-good ffmpeg build (a broken nightly libplacebo fails DV Profile-5 jobs); set TZ in docker-compose; node temp dir must be a real local drive on that machine.
